pattern: Translate each adjacent pair of the array into its comparison sign and slide a window of the pattern length to count exact matches.
hints: Every element of the pattern only cares about the sign of the difference between two neighbouring numbers, not their actual values.
Turn the array into a sequence of comparison signs (greater, equal, smaller) and then look for the pattern as a contiguous block inside it.
Slide a window of size equal to the pattern length over the array and check that every comparison inside the window agrees with the corresponding pattern entry.

edge_inputs.description: strictly increasing run matches an all-ones pattern
single-entry decreasing pattern over a descending array
pattern length one less than the array so only one window exists
all equal values only match all-zero pattern
no window matches an increasing pattern

stress.description: small alphabet so equal comparisons and matches occur often
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(2, min(size, 100))
    nums = [rng.randint(1, 4) for _ in range(n)]
    m = rng.randint(1, n - 1)
    pattern = [rng.randint(-1, 1) for _ in range(m)]
    return [nums, pattern]
stress.note: tight value range forces many ties

stress.description: wider values with a short pattern
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(2, min(size, 100))
    nums = [rng.randint(1, 50) for _ in range(n)]
    m = rng.randint(1, min(3, n - 1))
    pattern = [rng.randint(-1, 1) for _ in range(m)]
    return [nums, pattern]
